top_signals.title: UBS Hits Back Over Nazi-Accounts Probe Amid Senate Pressure
top_signals.summary: UBS Group AG accused the US lawyer overseeing a six-year-old inquiry into Credit Suisse’s handling of Nazi-linked accounts of bias and exceeding his mandate, deepening a standoff between the Swiss bank and its critics in Washington.
